originalAlarm.description: `__curr_1644` could be null (null value originating from line 2577) and is dereferenced.

sanitizedDescription: `curr` could be null (null value originating from line 2577) and is dereferenced.
model:

  false)

  true)

reasoning: Pulse duplicate of TRANSFORMATION_94/102. curr from malloc() at L65 can be NULL, dereferenced at L66 (curr->val = rand()%10) without NULL check. Genuine null dereference. No // ERROR at L66, new bug. Bug fires in all configs (L65-66 outside all #ifdefs). PC includes !SORTFILES and restrictive library macros — over-constrained.
